## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are **phase-tagged** per convention (D25): `<phase>(<id>): …` (e.g. `plan(003-workforce): …`, `tasks(...)`, `impl(...)`, `spec(...)`).
- [ ] Any **decision** made while producing this change has a matching **D-row** in `docs/90-DECISIONS-AND-IDEAS.md`, added in the same session the decision was made.
- [ ] Any **idea** surfaced while producing this change has a matching **I-row** in `docs/90-DECISIONS-AND-IDEAS.md`, added immediately.
- [ ] This change keeps **"artifacts are the contract"** intact — each phase touched reads its artifact(s) in and writes exactly one artifact out.
- [ ] No developer-machine absolute filesystem paths (macOS or Linux user home directories) or personal data were introduced into tracked files.
